div.p: Recursive pattern matching for *, ?, [...] against filenames

g.title: Entry Point: Initialize pattern pointer i=0, string pointer j=0
Invariant: pattern[i] is a standard literal character. Comparison: pattern[i] == string[j]
Wildcard *: Skip consecutive *, then non-deterministically try matching 0, 1, ... N characters
Wildcard ?: Consume exactly one character from the target string
Bracket Expression: Match single char against set, range (a-z), or negation [!abc]

ul.li: *: Greedy matching. Internal implementation typically uses recursive calls to handle multiple stars or backtracking on failure.
?: Matches any single octet except for the null terminator.

[...]:
[a-z]: Range match (locale dependent).
[!a-z]: Negated match (matches any char NOT in range).
Backtracking: If a path reaches FAIL, the engine pops the last MATCH_STAR state and increments the string pointer j.

g.title: Entry Point: Initialize pattern pointer i=0, string pointer j=0
Invariant: pattern[i] is a standard literal character. Comparison: pattern[i] == string[j]
Wildcard *: Skip consecutive *, then non-deterministically try matching 0, 1, ... N characters
Wildcard ?: Consume exactly one character from the target string
Bracket Expression: Match single char against set, range (a-z), or negation [!abc]
